explicit_text: My parents started their journey in central Mexico back in 1995. They were financially stable there, but when my mom got pregnant with me, they decided to move to the United States for a better life. Leaving Mexico was hard for my mom because she wanted to stay close to her own mother during the pregnancy, but my dad wanted me to be born in the U.S. and have opportunities beyond the typical farming work in Mexico.
